curation_notes: The advisory (duplicate of GHSA-5gjg-jgh4-gppm / CVE-2021-4236) explicitly describes the vulnerability: WebSocket requests do not call the AuthenticateMethod, leaving UserData nil. The patch commit 5a78f8d modifies only websocket.go, adding the AuthenticateMethod invocation and nil-check logic in the socketHandler function. Location derived directly from the single-file patch diff.
